tasks.title: Verify managed skills are complete and up-to-date
tasks.acceptance: All 6 skill files exist, >5000 bytes each, valid markdown with frontmatter or headers

tasks.title: Upgrade ThreeBackground — GPGPU particles with glow shader
tasks.acceptance: Particles use custom vertex/fragment shaders with additive blending. Cursor repulsion. 60fps on mid-range mobile. Reduced-motion fallback.

tasks.title: Add Aurora mesh gradient layer to HeroBackground
tasks.acceptance: Aurora animates smoothly via CSS @keyframes. 3 radial gradients (violet, blue, amber) on deep dark base. No layout shift. Works without JS.

tasks.title: Refactor Hero layout — asymmetric split desktop, centered mobile
tasks.acceptance: Desktop: 60/40 split text/cards. Mobile: centered stack. No horizontal scroll. Trust bar inline.

tasks.title: Upgrade typography — Unbounded + Onest with CIS rules
tasks.acceptance: H1: clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem), line-height 1.1, letter-spacing normal. Gradient accent on ONE word only. Cyrillic reads perfectly.

tasks.title: Add scroll-driven parallax + content fade
tasks.acceptance: Background parallax y:0%->30%. Content fade opacity:1->0 on scroll. Respects reduced-motion.

tasks.title: Premium micro-interactions — magnetic CTA + text reveal
tasks.acceptance: Magnetic effect with spring physics. TextRevealWords with blur+opacity. Scroll indicator animation.

tasks.title: Performance optimization — lazy load, code split, 60fps guard
tasks.acceptance: Dynamic import with ssr:false. Adaptive particle count. will-change:transform. IntersectionObserver lazy load. frameloop=demand. LCP < 2.5s.

tasks.title: Accessibility audit — reduced motion, contrast, focus
tasks.acceptance: Passes axe-core. Reduced motion works. Keyboard navigable. WCAG AA contrast.

tasks.title: Vercel deploy + visual regression check
tasks.acceptance: Deployed to production. LCP improved or maintained. No CLS regression.
